items.claim: Asu Almabaev's recent wins against Achoa and Perez were not impressive.
items.quote: Almabaev then barely gets by Achoa, and then barely gets by Perez. His wins aren't that impressive to me.

items.claim: Charles Johnson possesses high-level takedown defense.
items.quote: Charles Johnson has good takedown defense.

items.claim: Asu Almabaev will lose if the fight remains a striking contest against Charles Johnson.
items.quote: If Asu Almabaev gets stuck stuck in a striking fight against Charles Johnson, he will lose

items.claim: Charles Johnson maintains better cardio than his opponents in the third round.
items.quote: Johnson's going to be better off in the third round than his opponent.

items.claim: Charles Johnson has a significant height advantage over Asu Almabaev.
items.quote: By the way, he's 5'9". Almabayev is 5'4".

items.claim: Mateus Camilo's win over Viacheslav Borshchev was not an impressive performance.
items.quote: I'll tell you, it's not a very impressive fight out of Camilo.

items.claim: Mateus Camilo lacks finishing ability and damage output on the ground.
items.quote: Camilo is not doing much damage. Yeah, he's able to take down Borshchev kind of quite a bit, but you know, is he going out there and is he, you know, out-voluming him? Is he, you know, dominant on the ground once he gets the takedown? Not really.

items.claim: Said Nurmagomedov will outclass Mateus Camilo.
items.quote: I think he's going to get outclassed by Said Nurmagomedov to be honest with you.

items.claim: Said Nurmagomedov withdrew from a scheduled fight against Mark O. Madsen in April.
items.quote: I believe Yeah, it was Said Nurmagomedov withdrawing from that fight
